# Copilot Instructions

## 项目指南
- When using WPF-UI in this project, App.xaml should import `ui:ThemesDictionary` and `ui:ControlsDictionary` resources.
- For this project's WPF UI, prefer explicit dark background/foreground settings in `MainWindow.xaml` instead of relying solely on theme resource keys when visibility issues appear.

## Code Comments
- Use unified inline code comments following the template: '步骤编号 + 为什么 + 风险点'. This ensures clarity and consistency in code documentation.
